title: Cannot connect to database
description: Application timeout when connecting to PostgreSQL. Started 2 hours ago.

troubleshooting_steps: Check database server availability and status
Verify network connectivity to database server
Review database connection pool settings
Check recent database logs for errors
analysis_result.reasoning_summary: The ticket mentions keywords related to database issues, leading to this classification.

title: Application crash on startup
description: The mobile app crashes immediately after opening. Version 2.5.0 was released yesterday. We've received 200+ crash reports. iOS and Android both affected.

troubleshooting_steps: Check application logs for errors
Verify deployment status
Review recent code changes
Test application endpoints
analysis_result.reasoning_summary: The ticket mentions keywords related to application issues, leading to this classification.
